---
title: "fishtest.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\fishtest.py"
loc: 142
complexity: 23
logic_score: 0.95
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 2.53
overall_score: 1.22
---

## Intent
The `fishtest.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SPRT, __init__, update, run_test_case, run_test. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SPRT, __init__, update, run_test_case, run_test. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [math](file://math)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [time](file://time)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `SPRT`
- `__init__`
- `update`
- `run_test_case`
- `run_test`
